name: Speaker's Night
description: APASA collaborates with Speakers Committee to bring a celebrity to Bovard. Past guests include Niki, Charitha Chandran, Lana Condor, and Hasan Minhaj!

name: Night Market
description: Our Night Market brings together all of APASA’s member organizations to a celebration of games, food, live music, and prizes!

name: Cultural Arts Expo
description: CAE is a art marketplace and culture show showcasing APIDA small artist vendors and APASA performing member organizations

name: Community Dinner
description: Community Dinner is a professional development event that brings in LA-based APIDA professionals across all different backgrounds for a night of moderated discussion and catered dinner.

name: APAHF
description: The Asian Pacific American Heritage Festival is APASA’s month-long celebration in the month of March, featuring a kickoff and an Elementary School Showcase!

name: Cultural Collective
description: Cultural Collective is an involvement fair-style event where attendees can meet and learn more about APASA’s member organizations.
